mapper.select: SELECT file_id FROM esg.tb_sys_file WHERE target_type = 'clientLogo' AND target_id = #{clntId}

select t1.gubun , t1.hr_id , t2.hr_nm , t3.file_id as logo_id FROM esg.tb_hr_incharge_map t1 left join esg.tb_hr_info t2 on t1.hr_id = t2.hr_id left join esg.tb_sys_file t3 on t3.target_id = t1.hr_id and t3.target_type = 'hrImg' where t1.target_type = #{targetType} and t1.target_id = #{targetId} and t1.gubun = #{gubun} and t1.hr_id is not null and t1.hr_id != '' order by t2.ord_seq asc

select c.comp_id, c.comp_nm from esg.tb_client_info a left join esg.tb_comp_client_map b on a.clnt_id = b.clnt_id left join esg.tb_company_info c on b.comp_id = c.comp_id where a.clnt_id = #{clntId} and c.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.ord_seq asc, c.comp_id asc
SELECT clnt_nm FROM esg.tb_client_info WHERE clnt_id = #{clntId}
SELECT comp_nm FROM esg.tb_company_info WHERE comp_id = #{compId}

SELECT tai.*, sf.file_id AS logo_id, thi.user_id AS hr_user_id, CASE WHEN tai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN to_char(tai.updated_at, 'MM.dd hh24:mi') ELSE '' END AS sign_time, thi.use_yn FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON tai.hr_id = thi.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file sf ON sf.target_id = tai.hr_id AND sf.target_type = 'hrImg' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d dc ON dc.major_cd = 'C0045' AND dc.minor_cd = tai.param WHERE tai.target_type = #{targetType} AND tai.target_id = #{targetId} AND tai.type = #{type} ORDER BY dc.ord_seq ASC

SELECT twm.*, twi.workplace_nm AS nm, twi.ord_seq as seq FROM esg.tb_workplace_map twm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info twi ON twi.workplace_id = twm.workplace_id WHERE twm.target_type = #{targetType} AND twm.use_yn = 'Y' AND twm.target_id IN
#{id}

SELECT tpwc.rev_no, tpwc.process_id, tpwc.cnfm_at, tpwc.cnfm_yn, tpwc.use_yn AS rev_use_yn, tpwc.cnfm_by, tpw.*, tpi.process_nm, tpwm.target_id FROM esg.tb_process_work_map tpwm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_work tpw ON tpwm.prcs_work_id = tpw.prcs_work_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_process_work_cnfm tpwc ON tpw.prcs_cnfm_id = tpwc.prcs_cnfm_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_process_info tpi ON tpwm.process_id = tpi.process_id WHERE tpwm.target_type = #{targetType} AND tpwm.use_yn = 'Y' AND tpwm.target_id IN
#{id}

SELECT t1.gubun, t1.hr_id, t2.hr_nm, t3.file_id AS logo_id, t1.target_id FROM esg.tb_hr_incharge_map t1 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info t2 ON t1.hr_id = t2.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_file t3 ON t3.target_id = t1.hr_id AND t3.target_type = 'hrImg' WHERE t1.target_type = #{targetType} AND t1.gubun = #{gubun} AND t1.hr_id IS NOT NULL AND t1.hr_id != '' AND t1.target_id IN
#{id}
